qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: API Endpoints Expose Internal Infrastructure Details Without Authentication
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets unauthenticated Traefik v1.7 API/dashboard disclosure, not ForwardAuth or snippet auth forwarding of underscore alias X_Forwarded_* headers.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Go Template Injection in Redirect Replacement Enables HTTP Header Exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets redirect replacement strings parsed as Go templates from configuration, not the advisory's forwarded-header alias sanitization gap or ForwardAuth/snippet auth header-copy path.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: REST Provider Authorization Bypass Enables Unauthenticated Routing Configuration Injection
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets the unauthenticated REST provider PUT configuration endpoint, not pre-authentication bypass through unsanitized X_Forwarded_* alias headers reaching a ForwardAuth or snippet auth backend.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: Traefik's forwarded-header sanitizer strips canonical X-Forwarded-* headers but leaves underscore alias forms intact, and ForwardAuth/snippet auth copies those attacker-controlled aliases into authentication subrequests where normalizing auth backends may trust them. The manifest-listed qualifying findings cover unrelated API disclosure, redirect template evaluation, and REST provider configuration injection paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-5m6w-wvh7-57vm describes a ForwardAuth/snippet authentication bypass caused by unsanitized X_Forwarded_* alias headers being forwarded to auth backends.
api_information_disclosure/vulnerability_report.json is limited to unauthenticated GET access to Traefik v1.7 API/dashboard endpoints.
redirect_template_injection/vulnerability_report.json is limited to Go template evaluation in redirect replacement configuration.
rest_provider_bypass/vulnerability_report.json is limited to unauthenticated PUT configuration injection through the REST provider endpoint.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so Tier1/Tier2/Tier3 runtime classification is not applicable.
